title: Grant Sanderson (@3blue1brown) – AI and the future of math
summary: Grant Sanderson discusses AI's rapid progress in mathematics relative to other domains and argues mathematics provides concrete insight into what AI progress elsewhere will look like. The conversation explores whether AI increases or decreases human understanding, how AI might connect disparate ideas in mathematical literature, and what this means for students entering fields being transformed by AI.
writeup: Grant Sanderson of 3blue1brown talks with Dwarkesh Patel about AI's fast progress in mathematics and why math offers a concrete window into how AI progress will unfold in other domains. The conversation weighs whether AI increases or decreases human understanding, and considers how AI might connect scattered ideas across the mathematical literature. It also addresses what these shifts mean for students entering fields being reshaped by AI, touching on proof generation, reasoning, conceptual innovation, and reinforcement learning.
